user_task_description: This approval sheet contains several spend lines, but only some should be visually emphasized for review.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Highlight the budget lines whose amounts are strictly greater than $10,000.
atomic_scope: Only visual emphasis/highlighting is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised PDF with the correct lines highlighted.

inspired_by.title: How can you remove watermarks from a PDF?

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- Near-threshold distractors are present, including $9,900 and exactly $10,000
- The rule is strict inequality, not greater-than-or-equal
- The content is simple, so the difficulty comes from precise interpretation rather than document length
